name: Mexican Medley Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Lemon or lime juice, fresh
1 large Garlic clove, pressed or minced
1/4 teaspoon Pepper, cayenne, or to taste
2 tablespoons Pumpkin seeds, lightly toasted, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together lemon or lime juice, mustard, garlic, cayenne, cumin, and coriander.
2. Drizzle in olive oil very slowly, whisking constantly to emulsify.
3. Whisk in vinegar, or add salt to taste.
4. Add remaining ingredients except pumpkin seeds and toss well.
5. Serve at room temperature with a sprinkling of pumpkin seeds on top.
6. Serves 4 to 6.
